title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Elxsi - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Elxsi - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!
